meaning: vt.鎷掔粷,璋㈢粷n.搴熺墿,鍨冨溇
examples: I could hardly refuse, could I?
Can I refuse to give testimony?
Am I to understand that you refuse?
But the judge also ruled that she could not arbitrarily refuse to certify later-amended returns (based on recounts).
This time in Sicily, they once again, made me an offer I couldn't refuse.
